title: Affirm and Shopify Take Multi-Year Partnership Global
text:
Affirm and Shopify Take Multi-Year Partnership Global

Affirm and Shopify announced an expanded global agreement in February 2025, with the renewed multi-year partnership cementing Affirm's position as the exclusive pay-over-time provider for Shop Pay Installments.

Key Announcements:
- Affirm remains exclusive BNPL provider for Shop Pay Installments in the U.S.
- Partnership extends to Canada and planned expansion to U.K.
- Plans to enter new markets globally through the partnership
- Represents significant validation of Affirm's competitive position
- Enables continued scaling of merchant-side adoption internationally

The expanded partnership with Shopify represents a major strategic win for Affirm, providing access to millions of merchants globally and supporting the company's international growth strategy. The exclusivity arrangement underscores Shopify's confidence in Affirm's product and underwriting capabilities.
